title: A touchscreen and light make the new X4 Pro the best version of Xteink’s tiny e-readers
summary: But you don’t have to suffer with Xteink’s unpolished software. Of all the X4 Pro’s improvements, the most compelling reason to get Xteink’s latest e-reader is that the easy-to-install CrossPoint Reader software will be available at launch.
caption: output/2026-07-21/a-touchscreen-and-light-make-the-new-x4-pro-the-best-version-of-xteink.txt
